title: A dispensing device and a method of applying an antiseptic fluid
abstract: A dispensing device is provided. The dispensing device includes a hollow tube having one or more first pre-defined dimensions. The hollow tube is configured to hold one or more sponge pieces. The hollow tube includes an input end, wherein the input end is configured to receive a plunger and an antiseptic fluid. The plunger is configured to plunge at least one of the one or more sponge pieces soaked with the antiseptic fluid at an output end. The dispensing device also includes a nozzle mechanically coupled to the output end of the hollow tube. The nozzle is configured to firmly hold the at least one of the one or more sponge pieces plunged by the plunger.
claims:
Claims I/WE CLAIM: 1. A dispensing device (10) comprising: a hollow tube (20) having one or more first pre-defined dimensions configured to hold one or more sponge pieces (30), wherein the hollow tube (20) comprises an input end (40) configured to receive a plunger (50) and an antiseptic fluid (130), wherein the plunger (50) is configured to plunge at least one of the one or more sponge pieces (30) soaked with the antiseptic fluid (130) at an output end (100); and a nozzle mechanically coupled to the output end (100) of the hollow tube (20), wherein the nozzle is configured to firmly hold the at least one of the one or more sponge pieces (30) plunged by the plunger (50). 2. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the hollow tube (20) comprises the hollow tube (20) which is transparent. 3. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the hollow tube (20) comprises a predefined cross-sectional shape. 4. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 3, wherein the predefined cross-sectional shape comprises a circular shape, a squared shape or a rectangular shape. 5. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the one or more sponge pieces (30) comprises one or more second predefined dimensions. 6. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 5, wherein the one or more second predefined dimensions comprises the one or more second predefined dimensions corresponding to the one or more first pre-defined dimensions. 7. The dispensing device (10) as claimed in claim 1, wherein a cap is disposed at the output end (100) of the hollow tube (20) to cover the nozzle. 8. A method (140) of applying an antiseptic fluid, wherein the method (140) comprises: 

 receiving, via an input end of a hollow tube of a dispensing device, one or more sponge pieces; (150) receiving, via the input end of the hollow tube of the dispensing device, the antiseptic fluid; (160) receiving, via the input end of the hollow tube of the dispensing device, a plunger; (170) plunging, via the plunger, at least one of the one or more sponge pieces soaked with the antiseptic fluid at an output end of the hollow tube of the dispensing device; (180) and applying, via the at least one of the one or more sponge pieces, the antiseptic fluid on a surface (190). 9. The method (140) as claimed in claim 8, comprising holding, via a nozzle of the dispensing device, firmly the at least one of the one or more sponge pieces plunged by the plunger. 10. The method (140) as claimed in claim 9, comprising covering the nozzle with a cap when not in operation.
